channel.title: SATS
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in SATS

item.title: A Brief Note from the Editors
item.description: Article by Alexander Knopf DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sats-2024-0017

item.title: Philosophy as Passion for Knowledge: What Kind of History of Philosophy for the 21st Century?
item.description: Article by Alexander Knopf DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sats-2024-0016

item.title: Scientific Testability Following the Assumption of Insufficient Knowledge and Resources
item.description: Article by Alexander Knopf DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sats-2023-0020

item.title: Do Logical Aliens Think? Frege’s Agent-Relative View of Logic’s Constitutive Role for Thinking
item.description: Article by Alexander Knopf DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sats-2024-0002

item.title: Niklas Forsberg: Lectures on a Philosophy Less Ordinary: Language and Morality in J. L. Austin’s Philosophy
item.description: Article by Alexander Knopf DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sats-2024-2003

item.title: Ditte Marie Munch-Jurisic: Perpetrator Disgust. The Moral Limits of Gut Feelings

item.description: Article by Alexander Knopf DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sats-2024-2001
